category_sources: source_facts.description says cargo-clone is a Cargo subcommand that fetches Rust crate source code.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub repository; its README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions fetching source code of a Rust crate; source_facts.executables lists cargo-clone.
